data.label: 美摄 SDK
data.description: 视频拍摄 & 编辑 SDK 基于完全自主研发的跨平台视音频处理引擎，支持 iOS、Android、Web、PC、智能硬件等，提供视频模板(一键成片 & 剪同款)、智能视频创作、美颜滤镜、特效贴纸、智能校色、人像分割等整体解决方案。拥有高效灵活、低消耗、易扩展特点，降低内容创作门槛和成本，为企业和开发者提供具有竞争力的智能视频生产能力。

data.label: Meishe SDK
data.description: Video Shooting & Editing SDK is based on a fully self-developed cross-platform audio and video processing engine, supporting iOS, Android, Web, PC, smart hardware, etc. It provides video templates (one-click video creation & same style editing), intelligent video creation, beauty filters, special effects stickers, intelligent color correction, portrait segmentation, and other overall solutions. It features high efficiency, flexibility, low consumption, and easy expansion, lowering the threshold and cost of content creation, offering competitive intelligent video production capabilities to enterprises and developers.
